name: California Bean Sprout Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the red pepper by washing it, cutting in half, removing seeds and membranes, and cutting into small strips.
2. Wash the lettuce (Romaine and leaf), spin or blot dry, place in a plastic bag with a paper towel, seal the bag, and refrigerate.
3. Cut peeled jicama into 2-inch strips and refrigerate until serving time.
4. Bring 1 quart water to a boil in a saucepan. Add bean sprouts and blanch for two minutes. Remove from heat, run under cold water briefly, then immerse in ice water for one minute. Drain well. Mash boiled egg or put through a sieve; refrigerate.
5. In a small bowl, blend vinegar, sugar, and salt.
6. In a large bowl, combine bean sprouts, diced cucumbers, strips of red pepper, and avocado cubes. Add 1 teaspoon sesame oil if desired; blend well.
7. Add the vinegar mixture to the bean sprout mixture and toss to combine. Cover tightly and refrigerate for one hour.
8. To serve, tear lettuce into bite-sized pieces and divide equally among 4-6 salad plates. Top with the sprout mixture, sprinkle with chopped egg, and arrange jicama strips on one side of the salad. No further dressing needed for a delicious and healthy dish.
